title: Iron Ore Flows And Capesize Tonne Days
section_path: Iron Ore Flows And Capesize Tonne Days
section_path_text: Iron Ore Flows And Capesize Tonne Days
summary:
Main
Dry Weekly Market Monitor - Week 28.2024 Snapshot of Spot Freight Rates, Supply-Demand Trends, Port Congestions July 10, 2024
The second week of July brings a downward revision in the performance of the Capesize segment, while the decreasing count of ballasters fosters optimism for the coming days. This reduction in available ballast vessels could tighten supply and potentially support higher freight rates. Regarding the monthly volume of Brazilian iron ore shipments to China, June concluded with a significant 20% increase over May's levels.
